chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 2275 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For Hg of Bail Application 19.12.2023: Mr. Noor Khan Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Imran Kalmati Advocate along with Applicant on bail Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General for the State.-.-.-.-.-. The Applicant is nominated accused in FIR No. 302 of 2022 registered under Section 320/337-G PPC at Police Station Quidabad, Karachi. The facts of the case in brief are that on 01.06.2022 at 1130 AM, the Applicant Aminullah while driving Truck bearing Registration No. LSA-2537 hit motor cycle of the complainant as a result, his mother and niece Sanoli received injuries they were taken to hospital where his niece Sanoli died. Sections 320/337-G PPC are bailable where bail is to be given as a right and will have to be determined after evidence is led at trial. Interim pre arrest bail earlier granted to the Applicant is confirmed on same terms and conditions. J U D G E Amjad PS
